scripts.dev: npm run infra:up && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && concurrently -n api,worker -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/db && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/worker
scripts.start: npm run build && concurrently -n api,worker -c cyan,magenta "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/worker"
